import axiosInstance from'./axiosInstance';const resumeService={upload:file=>{const form=new FormData();form.append('file',file);return axiosInstance.post('/api/resumes',form,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});},getMyResumes:()=>axiosInstance.get('/api/resumes'),getById:id=>axiosInstance.get("/api/resumes/".concat(id)),// Returns a blob URL — caller must revoke it after use
download:async(id,originalFileName)=>{const response=await axiosInstance.get("/api/resumes/".concat(id,"/download"),{responseType:'blob'});const url=window.URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([response.data],{type:'application/pdf'}));const link=document.createElement('a');link.href=url;link.setAttribute('download',originalFileName);document.body.appendChild(link);link.click();link.remove();window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);},delete:id=>axiosInstance.delete("/api/resumes/".concat(id))};export default resumeService;
